rationale: Educ. Code §43.061 governs record retention policies for a corporation and is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 43.061. RECORD RETENTION. (a) Subchapter L, Chapter 441, Government Code, does not apply to the corporation.
_note: Rule text pertains to record retention; no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
